5.11.43.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.43 adds new drivers and enhances diagnostics with PII sanitization.

5.11.42.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.42 adds new automation for variant discovery and enhances driver capabilities with 144 drivers and 4943 fingerprints.

5.11.41.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.41 adds auto-discovery for all variants and product IDs, includes 144 drivers and 4943 fingerprints.

5.11.40.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.40 adds 3077 new fingerprints and introduces an IR Remote driver.

5.11.39.en: Added support for Zigbee IR Remote (Moes UFO-R11 / TS1201) with new capabilities.

5.11.38.en: Added 10 new fingerprints and improved auto-resolution for GitHub issues in v5.11.38.

5.11.37.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.37: Added 9 missing fingerprints, improved auto-resolution, and fixed promotion pipeline.

5.11.36.en: Added 9 missing fingerprints and improved diagnostics scan functionality.

5.11.35.en: Updated Universal Tuya Zigbee app to v5.11.35 with 143 drivers and 4918 fingerprints.

5.11.34.en: Updated to v5.11.34 with comprehensive getSetting audit and workflow improvements.

5.11.33.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.33: Added diagnostics infrastructure and bug fixes, updated 143 drivers with 3057 fingerprints.

5.11.32.en: Fixed ReferenceError in IAS verification and added support for _TZ3000_itb0omhv.

5.11.31.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.31: Updated drivers and improved documentation.

5.11.30.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.30: Re-enabled read-only forum intel, fixed driver misplacement, and updated 143 drivers with 3062 fingerprints.

5.11.29.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.29: Cleanup of scripts and workflows.

5.11.28.en: Updated to v5.11.28 with 143 drivers and 3062 fingerprints. Includes script fixes for forum post editing.

5.11.27.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.27: Added new AI providers and improved forum management.

5.11.26.en: Fixed forum duplication issues and improved AI ensemble routing for better task classification.

5.11.25.en: v5.11.25: Fixed voltage divisor in driver #137 — readings were off by a factor of 10 on some plug variants., Dashboard fallback rewrite — device tiles now update properly when the primary state channel drops., 17 new fingerprints from community contributions (138 drivers, 5182+ total FPs)., Internal cleanup across several workflow scripts.

5.11.24.en: v5.11.24: Fixed a workflow trigger race condition. Forum scanner now covers 12 topics. Better diagnostics tracking between runs.

5.11.44.en: v5.11.43: Added support for 144 drivers and 4943 fingerprints., Enhanced fetch-gmail-diagnostics with PII sanitization., Introduced issue-deep-researcher.js to scan all open PRs/issues and auto-implement findings., Implemented variant-scanner.js to auto-discover all variants and product IDs., Updated enrichment pipeline with codified FP research intelligence.
